prompt: Suggest portfolio rebalancing for META, PLTR, SPY based on current positions and risk targets

quant_summary.title: Optimization Recommendation
quant_summary.summary_text: Current allocation is 48% META-heavy. Suggested rebalance: reduce META to 35%, increase SPY to 40%. Projected risk reduction: 14%.

visualizer_pseudo_prompt: Side-by-side bar charts for current vs target allocation with delta arrows. Include risk score gauge.
